metadata.description: Genetic Narrative Alleles for deterministic media recommendation.

alleles.name: System Rigidity
alleles.definition: The degree to which the world follows immutable, internally consistent rules.
alleles.endpoint_1: Soft/Arbitrary: Rules change to fit the plot; outcomes are determined by 'destiny' or luck.
alleles.endpoint_5: Hard/Rigid: Rules are established early and never broken; characters must find logical solutions within constraints.

alleles.name: Information Transparency
alleles.definition: How explicitly the 'System Manual' or underlying mechanics are explained to the user.
alleles.endpoint_1: Obscure: Mechanics are mysterious or hidden; focus is on the 'what' rather than the 'how'.
alleles.endpoint_5: Technical/Explicit: High documentation; the audience understands the exact variables of the conflict (The Explanation).

alleles.name: Causality Integrity
alleles.definition: The absence of external code injection or plot armor to resolve conflicts.
alleles.endpoint_1: Deus Ex Machina: Major problems are solved by sudden outside forces or unearned power-ups (Glitches).
alleles.endpoint_5: Logic-Driven: Outcomes are the direct, unavoidable result of prior setup and character agency.

alleles.name: Strategic Intent
alleles.definition: The protagonist's approach to the system.
alleles.endpoint_1: Reactive/Prey: The character is a victim of circumstances, hiding or merely surviving.
alleles.endpoint_5: Proactive/Predator: The character actively analyzes, manipulates, or optimizes the system to their advantage.

alleles.name: Deception Density
alleles.definition: The presence of social engineering, information asymmetry, and layered schemes.
alleles.endpoint_1: Transparent: Characters say what they mean; conflicts are face-to-face and honest.
alleles.endpoint_5: Layered: Extensive use of predator deception, double-blinds, and hidden agendas.

alleles.name: Social Stakes
alleles.definition: The scale of the system affected by the narrative's resolution.
alleles.endpoint_1: Personal: The outcome only affects the immediate emotional state or life of the protagonist.
alleles.endpoint_5: Systemic: The outcome alters the architecture of the world, government, or universal parameters.

alleles.name: Narrative Density
alleles.definition: The ratio of information/plot progression to runtime/page count.
alleles.endpoint_1: The Stall: Frequent use of flashbacks, repetitive internal monologues, or 'filler' to extend length.
alleles.endpoint_5: The Explanation: High-velocity information delivery; every scene contributes to system-building or plot progression.

alleles.name: Linearity
alleles.endpoint_1: Status Quo/Loop: The world returns to its starting state after every arc; characters don't truly evolve.
alleles.endpoint_5: Progressive Evolution: The world and characters are fundamentally changed; there is no 'reset' button.

alleles.name: Awe Factor
alleles.definition: The feeling of 'Sense of Wonder' elicited by the scale or ingenuity of the system.
alleles.endpoint_1: Mundane: Focuses on everyday occurrences or grounded, familiar settings without discovery.
alleles.endpoint_5: Wonder: Evokes awe through the discovery of vast systems, ancient architectures, or novel logic.

alleles.name: Tone Stability
alleles.definition: The overall outlook of the world-system.
alleles.endpoint_1: Misery Porn: Focuses on unearned suffering, hopelessness, and the degradation of the character (Red Zone).
alleles.endpoint_5: Constructive: Focuses on growth, optimization, and the success of logical effort (Green Zone).
